description: Color event photograph. A close, vertical-format shot inside a theater with red upholstered seats shows new citizens standing with right hands raised taking the oath. The central figure is a young Black U.S. Marine in dress blues (with medals, corporal chevron, and white belt) wearing a black face mask; to his right a young Black man in a Navy dress uniform also raises his hand; to his left a woman in a maroon hijab and dark coat raises her hand while holding an envelope. Other masked attendees are blurred in the background, and a small handheld American flag is visible at lower right. It is a natural-light color photograph with no overlaid slogan text or graphic design and no visible watermark. Per the tweet, this is the Presidents Day naturalization ceremony at George Washington's Mount Vernon.
